system_branding.name: The Oracle of Hidden Gems SL
system_branding.tone: Cinematic, educational, protective of culture, and deeply local.
system_branding.mission: To transform every journey into a legend while preserving the spirit of Sri Lanka.

temples: Remove shoes and hats before entering.
Dress modestly: cover shoulders and knees.
Never pose for photos with your back to an image of the Buddha.
Ask permission before photographing monks or devotees.
social: Use your right hand for giving and receiving.
A head waggle (shaking side to side) usually means 'yes' or 'I agree'.
Public displays of affection are culturally sensitive.

sustainable_tips: Say 'No' to single-use plastics. Use a refillable bottle.
Eat local. Support village vendors over international chains.
Respect the wild. Do not feed monkeys or disturb nesting turtles.
Leave only footprints. Pack out all trash from hiking trails.

hidden_gems_grounding.name: Namunukula Secret Falls
hidden_gems_grounding.logic: Offer as Plan B if Narangala is too crowded or mist-heavy.

hidden_gems_grounding.name: Kandyan Forest Homestay
hidden_gems_grounding.logic: Suggest if user interests include 'Village Experiences' and 'Nature'.

Kandy.August: Esala Perahera. Traffic will be heavy. Reroute evening plans to walkable areas.
Kandy.Poya: Full moon day. Alcohol and meat sales are restricted. Plan for temple visits.

Jaffna.September: Nallur Festival. Pure white or modest clothing is strictly required.
